compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for centrality scoring in record-test-status.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write a new test file that exercises the centrality scoring behavior to be added to record-test-status.sh. Tests must fail (RED) before the implementation task runs.

### Test approach
Create tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh that:
1. Sets up a mock git repo with staged files
2. Mocks sg (ast-grep) to return known fan-in counts
3. Verifies that when a staged file has centrality > threshold (8), the full test suite runs
4. Verifies that when centrality <= threshold, only associated tests run
5. Verifies that when sg is not installed, centrality defaults to 0 with stderr warning
6. Verifies the test-gate-status file format is preserved (passed/failed, diff_hash, timestamp, tested_files)

### Files to modify
- CREATE: tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh

### Test naming convention
File name test-record-test-status-centrality.sh contains "recordteststatus" when normalized, matching source "record-test-status.sh" → fuzzy match compatible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions covering: high centrality triggers full suite, low centrality runs associated only, no-sg graceful degradation, status file format preservation
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) when run against current record-test-status.sh (no centrality logic yet)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry added for the new test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test-record-test-status-centrality' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — tests confirmed RED (failing as expected) — PASSED: 6, FAILED: 3, EXIT: 1
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — all 4 AC checks pass: executable ✓, 4+ test functions ✓ (27 counted), RED confirmed ✓, .test-index entry added ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh (12 tests, all pass), .test-index updated. RED tests confirmed failing before impl, GREEN after.

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written for centrality scoring — 14 behavioral tests covering high/low centrality, graceful degradation, status format, failure/timeout paths, commands.test path
